expectations.text: Response provides the correct Sefaria endpoint URL with URL-encoded reference
expectations.evidence: Response provides: 'GET https://www.sefaria.org/api/texts/Psalms%2023:1?lang=en' -- correct URL encoding with %20 for space and colon format

expectations.text: Response explains the text normalization steps (strip HTML, flatten array)
expectations.evidence: Normalization section explicitly covers: (1) Flatten arrays, (2) Strip HTML tags via regex, (3) Trim whitespace -- all three steps from the skill

expectations.text: Response shows how to extract text from the json.text field
expectations.evidence: Code uses `data.text` to access the response, consistent with the skill's Sefaria response documentation

expectations.text: Response mentions the Sefaria attribution requirement (CC BY-SA 2.0)
expectations.evidence: Response includes: 'Per the API requirements, you should include the following attribution in your UI: Sefaria.org -- CC BY-SA 2.0'
